description_long: This handgun features a robust, angular frame with a matte black finish and a prominent, elongated slide. The grip is visually striking, wrapped in a deep purple band over a reddish-brown wood-textured panel, providing both color contrast and ergonomic support. The trigger guard is thick and squared, offering ample space and a reinforced appearance. The barrel is long and heavy, extending well past the frame, with a solid, unadorned exterior and no visible threading or compensator. The slide is detailed with geometric ridges and grooves but lacks any visible manufacturer markings or engravings. The magazine base is flat and slightly flared, with the purple wrap extending to its bottom edge, giving the handgun a unique and modern aesthetic.
description: A modern, angular black handgun with a long barrel, purple-wrapped wood-textured grip, and a flat, flared magazine base. The design is bold and distinctive, with geometric slide details and no visible markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black slide, the purple-wrapped wood-textured grip, and the squared trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, the thick slide, and the width of the grip with purple wrapping visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the same grip and slide details, with the magazine base and trigger guard visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip, the purple wrap, and the alignment of the slide and barrel.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with a reddish-brown wood-textured panel on each side, partially wrapped in a thick, deep purple band that covers the lower half. The grip appears ergonomic, with subtle finger grooves and a smooth, slightly glossy finish. The purple wrap adds a cushioned, grippy texture, enhancing comfort and control. No logos or embellishments are visible, but the color contrast and material combination make the grip visually distinctive.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thick, squared, and robust, with a straight lower edge and a slight undercut near the grip for improved finger placement. It is integrated seamlessly into the frame, with no visible texturing or reinforcement beyond its solid construction. The guard is large enough to accommodate gloved fingers and has a utilitarian, modern appearance.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and heavy, extending well past the frame with a solid, unadorned exterior. It has a standard round profile with no visible threading, porting, or compensator. The finish matches the matte black of the slide, and there are no external markings or decorative features.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The slide is characterized by geometric ridges and grooves, providing visual interest and grip, but lacks any manufacturer logos, model names, or serial numbers.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and slightly flared, with the purple wrap extending to cover its bottom edge. The base has a smooth finish with no finger rest, logos, or additional texturing, but the color and shape make it stand out visually.
